faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Ridgewood, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Ridgewood typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. Multi-unit buildings may require additional coordination with neighbors. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat bed bugs in Ridgewood apartments?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Ridgewood for urgent bed bug cases. Most treatments are completed in one day, though severe infestations may require follow-up visits. Heat treatments provide immediate results, while chemical treatments may need 2-3 weeks for complete elimination of all life stages.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families in Ridgewood homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe for families, children, and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We use low-toxicity products and provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry. Heat treatments are completely chemical-free and are especially popular among Ridgewood families with young children.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Ridgewood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Ridgewood. If bed bugs return within the warranty period, we will re-treat your home at no additional charge. We also provide prevention tips and can create a monitoring plan for multi-family buildings to prevent re-infestation from neighboring units.
